name: capacitor-calculator
description: A calculator app built with Capacitor

scripts.copy-files: if not exist dist mkdir dist && copy index.html dist\ && copy style.css dist\ && copy calculator.js dist\
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.add:android: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.add:ios: npm run build && npx cap add ios
scripts.build:android: npm run sync:android && npx cap open android

author: Your Name
